description.value: Your bond with your partner allows you to literally feel their pain, making it easier to treat their injuries. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Battle Medicine] feat even if you don't meet the prerequisites, but you can only use it on your bonded partner unless you're trained in Medicine. When you succeed with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Battle Medicine] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Treat Wounds], your bonded partner gains a circumstance bonus to the number of Hit Points they regain equal to 5 HP at DC 20, 10 HP at DC 30, or 15 HP at DC 40.

value.value: You have a bond with the Sympathetic Bond feat or dragonkin partner bond feature.
